cmdb_software.query: SELECT name, version, publisher, install_date FROM programs;

cmdb_network.query: SELECT interface, address, mask FROM interface_addresses WHERE address NOT IN ('127.0.0.1', '::1', '0.0.0.0');

cmdb_usb_devices.query: SELECT vendor, model, serial, usb_port FROM usb_devices;

cmdb_users.query: SELECT username, description, directory, uuid, type FROM users;

cmdb_patches.query: SELECT hotfix_id, description, installed_by, installed_on FROM patches;

cmdb_startup_items.query: SELECT name, path, type, status FROM startup_items;

cmdb_logical_drives.query: SELECT device_id, free_space, size, file_system FROM logical_drives;
